creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

We debugged this due to a stray /usr/local/include/ansidecl.h file not 
owned by any port.  Once removed, everything went back to normal. 

Somewhat related, I filed ports/136701: devel/libbfd not properly marked 
as conflicting with devel/binutils.
